exceptions.reason: The staging distribution intentionally uses the cloudfront.net hostname and CloudFront default certificate. Aqua documents that this certificate mode only permits TLSv1 and that setting TLSv1.2_2021 causes a perpetual Terraform diff; HTTPS redirect remains enforced.

The production distribution intentionally uses the cloudfront.net hostname and CloudFront default certificate. Aqua documents that this certificate mode only permits TLSv1 and that setting TLSv1.2_2021 causes a perpetual Terraform diff; HTTPS redirect remains enforced.
CloudWatch Logs authorizes child log streams with the required log-group ARN suffix :*; the allowed actions are limited to logs:CreateLogStream and logs:PutLogEvents.

The Mandate 12 audit heartbeat role is read-only and holds no mutating action. Resource-level scoping is not available for cloudwatch:DescribeAlarms or cloudtrail:DescribeTrails, and the log statement uses the CloudWatch Logs child-stream ARN suffix :* that is required to address streams under the heartbeat log group.
